entries.name: akm-cli-reference
entries.description: Use when an agent needs the main akm-cli v0.7.0 commands, flags, and workflow authoring rules in one place.

entries.name: akm-overview
entries.description: Use when an agent needs a quick conceptual overview of akm, its asset types, and the major v0.7.0 surfaces.

entries.name: akm-registry-schema
entries.description: Use when an agent needs the current registry index schema and install metadata fields for published stashes.

entries.name: akm-stash-structure
entries.description: Use when an agent is authoring or reorganizing a stash and needs the v0.7.0 directory, command, workflow, and lesson conventions.

entries.name: akm-proposals-and-lessons
entries.description: Use when an agent needs the v0.7.0 proposal queue, quality values, and lesson lifecycle explained clearly.

entries.name: akm-benchmark-fixtures
entries.description: Use when an agent is authoring benchmark fixtures or reusable test stashes and needs the MANIFEST.json and task.yaml format plus anti-leak rules.
